title: Tier 4 — Algorithmes Avancés & Architecture (Niveau Frontier)
prompt:
You are taking a TIER 4 FRONTIER evaluation — advanced algorithms and software architecture.

Solve 6 exercises. Return your answers in Markdown using headers for the exercise IDs and code blocks for the JavaScript functions.

[4-A] JavaScript class LRUCache(capacite) — get(cle): returns stored value or -1 if not found; put(cle, valeur): inserts and evicts the LRU entry when full. Must use Map internally for O(1) operations on both get and put.
[4-B] JavaScript function clonageSecurise(obj) — deep clone that handles circular references (use a WeakMap), nested objects, arrays, and Date objects. Returns a fully independent copy without throwing on circular refs.
[4-C] Async JavaScript function executerAvecConcurrence(taches, maxConcurrence) — executes an array of async functions with AT MOST maxConcurrence tasks running simultaneously. Returns an array of results in the original task order.
[4-D] JavaScript function evaluerExpression(expr) — evaluates an arithmetic string expression supporting +, -, *, /, and parentheses with correct operator precedence. Must NOT use eval(). Returns a number.
[4-E] JavaScript class Trie — prefix tree with four methods: inserer(mot), chercher(mot) (exact match → boolean), commencePar(prefixe) (→ boolean), suggestions(prefixe) (→ array of all words with that prefix).
[4-F] JavaScript function dijkstra(graphe, depart) — Dijkstra shortest path algorithm. graphe format: { A: { B: 4, C: 2 }, B: { D: 1 }, ... }. Returns an object { A: 0, B: 3, ... } with Infinity for unreachable nodes.

Expected strict response format:
{
  "tache_4a": "class LRUCache { constructor(capacite) { ... } get(cle) { ... } put(cle, valeur) { ... } }",
  "tache_4b": "function clonageSecurise(obj) { ... }",
  "tache_4c": "async function executerAvecConcurrence(taches, maxConcurrence) { ... }",
  "tache_4d": "function evaluerExpression(expr) { ... }",
  "tache_4e": "class Trie { constructor() { ... } inserer(mot) { ... } chercher(mot) { ... } commencePar(prefixe) { ... } suggestions(prefixe) { ... } }",
  "tache_4f": "function dijkstra(graphe, depart) { ... }"
}

evaluations.call: (function() { var c = new LRUCache(2); c.put(1,1); c.put(2,2); return c.get(1); })()
(function() { var c = new LRUCache(2); c.put(1,1); c.put(2,2); c.get(1); c.put(3,3); return c.get(2); })()

evaluations.description: La nouvelle entrée est accessible après éviction
evaluations.call: (function() { var c = new LRUCache(2); c.put(1,1); c.put(2,2); c.get(1); c.put(3,3); return c.get(3); })()
(function() { var c = new LRUCache(1); return c.get(99); })()

evaluations.description: Mise à jour d'une clé existante
evaluations.call: (function() { var c = new LRUCache(2); c.put(1,1); c.put(1,42); return c.get(1); })()

evaluations.description: Objet simple — indépendance de la copie
evaluations.call: (function() { var o = { a: 1 }; var c = clonageSecurise(o); c.a = 99; return o.a; })()
(function() { var o = { x: { y: { z: 42 } } }; var c = clonageSecurise(o); return c.x.y.z; })()
(function() { var o = { nom: 'racine' }; o.self = o; var c = clonageSecurise(o); return c.nom; })()
(function() { var o = { arr: [1,2,3] }; var c = clonageSecurise(o); c.arr.push(4); return o.arr.length; })()
(function() { var d = new Date(2024,0,1); var o = { d: d }; var c = clonageSecurise(o); return c.d instanceof Date && c.d.getFullYear() === 2024; })()

evaluations.description: Limite de concurrence respectée + résultats en ordre

evaluations.call: evaluerExpression('2+3*4')
evaluerExpression('(2+3)*4')
evaluerExpression('10/2-3')
evaluerExpression(' 100 ')

evaluations.description: eval() interdit (sécurité — pas d'exécution de code arbitraire)

tasks.label: Trie — arbre de préfixes avec suggestions

evaluations.call: (function() { var t = new Trie(); t.inserer('bonjour'); return t.chercher('bonjour'); })()
(function() { var t = new Trie(); t.inserer('bonjour'); return t.chercher('bon'); })()

evaluations.description: commencePar → true pour un préfixe existant
evaluations.call: (function() { var t = new Trie(); t.inserer('bonjour'); return t.commencePar('bon'); })()

evaluations.description: commencePar → false pour un préfixe absent
evaluations.call: (function() { var t = new Trie(); t.inserer('bonjour'); return t.commencePar('xyz'); })()

evaluations.description: suggestions retourne tous les mots avec le préfixe
evaluations.call: (function() { var t = new Trie(); ['bonsoir','bonjour','bonbon','chat'].forEach(function(m){ t.inserer(m); }); var s = t.suggestions('bon'); return s.length === 3 && s.includes('bonsoir') && s.includes('bonjour') && s.includes('bonbon'); })()
(function() { var d = dijkstra({ A:{B:1}, B:{}, C:{} }, 'A'); return d.C === Infinity || d.C === undefined || d.C === null; })()

evaluations.description: Nœud de départ — distance 0 à lui-même
evaluations.call: (function() { var d = dijkstra({ A:{} }, 'A'); return d.A; })()

evaluations.description: Chemin indirect plus court que direct
evaluations.call: (function() { var d = dijkstra({ A:{B:10,C:1}, C:{B:2}, B:{} }, 'A'); return d.B; })()
